prompt: {"type":"fitness gym website hero section mockup","style":"ultra-polished modern Japanese landing page, premium sports branding, dark neon blue color grading, high contrast, cinematic advertising look, realistic photo composited with glossy UI design","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"BLUE IMPACT GYM\"}","logo":"sharp angular blue-and-white lightning emblem to the left of the brand name"},"canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"16:9","composition":"single full-width first-view website header"},"background":{"theme":"dark luxury gym interior with blurred equipment and dramatic blue light streaks","effects":["electric blue diagonal motion lines","lens flares","glowing highlights","subtle smoky depth","metallic reflections"]},"navigation":{"position":"top bar","count":5,"items":["特徴","プラン・料金","店舗情報","資料請求","お問い合わせ"],"style":"white Japanese text links centered, two outlined/glowing CTA buttons on the right"},"main_visual":{"subject":"muscular Asian male personal trainer in his 20s to 30s, upper body prominently shown on the right half, holding a black dumbbell near his torso, wearing a fitted black sleeveless athletic tank top, sweaty skin, defined shoulders and arms, intense premium fitness campaign look","face":"partially frontal portrait with confident posture","lighting":"hard rim light and cool blue highlights emphasizing muscle definition"},"headline":{"position":"left-center","text":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"限界を、超えろ。\"}","style":"very large bold distressed Japanese display typography in white, dynamic slanted layout, gritty texture"},"subcopy":{"position":"left-lower under headline","text":"20代〜30代男性のための、本気で変わるトレーニング空間。理想のカラダづくりを最短でサポート。","style":"smaller white Japanese text, 2 lines, clean sans-serif"},"trainer_profile":{"position":"right side vertical text beside the model","count":3,"items":["全日本マッスル協会 副会長","筋肉 凄蔵","トレーナー歴12年・累計生徒数2000人以上"],"style":"vertical white Japanese text, premium editorial arrangement"},"cta_area":{"position":"lower left to center","count":3,"buttons":[{"label":"無料体験はこちら","style":"primary glowing blue gradient rounded rectangle"},{"label":"料金プランを見る","style":"dark transparent rounded rectangle with white border"},{"label":"お問合せ","style":"dark transparent rounded rectangle with white border"}]},"campaign_banner":{"position":"lower right overlapping the subject","count":3,"texts":["今なら","入会金0円","キャンペーン実施中！"],"style":"bold blue translucent ribbon banner, oversized white numeral 0, energetic promotional emphasis"},"feature_row":{"position":"bottom full width","count":4,"items":[{"icon":"24 in a circle","title":"24時間営業","description":"いつでも好きな時間にトレーニング。"},{"icon":"downward arrow/leaf-like emblem in a circle","title":"初心者歓迎","description":"初めてでも安心のサポート体制。"},{"icon":"map pin in a circle","title":"駅近3分","description":"通いやすい好立地で続けやすい。"},{"icon":"person with tie in a circle","title":"プロトレーナー在籍","description":"目標達成を専門トレーナーが支援。"}]},"palette":{"primary":"electric blue","secondary":"deep navy","text":"white","accent":"glow cyan"},"design_notes":["make it look like an AI-generated high-end web design concept for a gym landing page","keep the layout clean, persuasive, and conversion-focused","emphasize a premium but aggressive transformation message","all visible interface text should be in Japanese","use sharp modern sans-serif fonts for UI and bold display lettering for the headline"]}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"健身房网站首屏模型","style":"超精致现代日本落地页，高端运动品牌感，深霓虹蓝调色，高对比度，电影级广告质感，写实照片与精致 UI 设计合成","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"BLUE IMPACT GYM\"}","logo":"品牌名称左侧带有锐利棱角的蓝白闪电标志"},"canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"16:9","composition":"单屏全宽网站页眉"},"background":{"theme":"深色奢华健身房内部，背景虚化器材与戏剧性的蓝色光束","effects":["电光蓝对角线运动线条","镜头光晕","发光高光","微妙的烟雾深度","金属质感反射"]},"navigation":{"position":"顶部栏","count":5,"items":["特点","计划与价格","门店信息","资料索取","联系我们"],"style":"居中的白色日文文本链接，右侧有两个带轮廓/发光的 CTA 按钮"},"main_visual":{"subject":"20 至 30 岁肌肉发达的亚裔男性私人教练，右半部分突出显示上半身，躯干附近握着黑色哑铃，穿着修身黑色无袖运动背心，皮肤带汗，肩部和手臂线条分明，强烈的顶级健身广告风格","face":"部分正面肖像，姿态自信","lighting":"硬朗的轮廓光和冷蓝色高光，强调肌肉线条"},"headline":{"position":"左中","text":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"限界を、超えろ。\"}","style":"超大号粗体做旧日文标题字体，白色，动态倾斜布局，颗粒质感"},"subcopy":{"position":"标题下方左侧","text":"20 代〜30 代男性のための、本気で変わるトレーニング空間。理想のカラダづくりを最短でサポート。","style":"较小的白色日文文本，2 行，简洁无衬线字体"},"trainer_profile":{"position":"模特旁边的右侧竖排文字","count":3,"items":["全日本肌肉协会副会长","筋肉 凄蔵","教练经验 12 年，累计学员 2000 人以上"],"style":"竖排白色日文文本，高端排版设计"},"cta_area":{"position":"左下至中心","count":3,"buttons":[{"label":"免费体验请点击这里","style":"主色调发光蓝色渐变圆角矩形"},{"label":"查看价格计划","style":"深色透明圆角矩形，带白色边框"},{"label":"联系我们","style":"深色透明圆角矩形，带白色边框"}]},"campaign_banner":{"position":"右下角覆盖主体","count":3,"texts":["现在加入","入会费 0 元","活动进行中！"],"style":"粗体蓝色半透明丝带横幅，超大白色数字 0，充满活力的促销强调"},"feature_row":{"position":"底部全宽","count":4,"items":[{"icon":"圆圈中的 24","title":"24 小时营业","description":"随时随地，想练就练。"},{"icon":"圆圈中的向下箭头/叶状标志","title":"欢迎新手","description":"即使是初学者也能安心的支援体制。"},{"icon":"圆圈中的地图定位图标","title":"车站步行 3 分钟","description":"交通便利，轻松坚持。"},{"icon":"圆圈中的领带人士图标","title":"专业教练在籍","description":"专业教练协助您达成目标。"}]},"palette":{"primary":"电光蓝","secondary":"深海军蓝","text":"白色","accent":"发光青色"},"design_notes":["使其看起来像 AI 生成的高端健身房落地页网页设计概念","保持布局简洁、具有说服力且以转化为导向","强调高端且具有冲击力的蜕变信息","所有可见的界面文本应为日文","UI 使用锐利的现代无衬线字体，标题使用粗体展示字体"]}

breakdown.creativeCore: 日本健身房 Hero 落地页：此内容用于生成高端日本健身房的 AI 风格首屏网站模型，适用于落地页概念设计及作品集风格的网页视觉呈现。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, neon, high contrast, lens]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
